heading: Enforcement of Convention
label: 201 Enforcement of Convention
text: The Convention on the Recognition and Enforcement of Foreign Arbitral Awards of , shall be enforced in United States courts in accordance with this chapter.June 10, 1958
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that: The Convention entered into force for the United States on .Pub. L. 91–368, § 484 Stat. 693July 31, 1970Dec. 29, 1970“This Act [enacting this chapter] shall be effective upon the entry into force of the Convention on Recognition and Enforcement of Foreign Arbitral Awards with respect to the United States.”
